entries.final_answer: One cohesive mission (~4 lanes): Lane A body-link gate, Lane B CHANGELOG sync+links, Lane C ADR migration+census, Lane D prose sweep+policy. Items 1/2/3 are coupled through the gate's adr/changelog coverage, so splitting would duplicate resolver work.
entries.question: How should the mission for #2245 be sliced?

entries.final_answer: One-time C-002-waived migration: rewrite the ~26 dead links in ADR bodies to live targets in a sanctioned pass, amend 2026-06-27-1-common-docs-reconciliation.md with the waiver+before/after rationale, and re-pin the byte-invariance baseline. Preferred over a redirect-tolerant gate for a clean end-state with no link indirection; lets the new gate cover docs/adr/ with no special tolerance afterward.
entries.question: For the ~26 broken links inside byte-invariant ADR bodies, which approach?
